summary: Phase A Platform Alignment Testing Complete. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all new components: UnifiedHero rotator, ClientPromoStrip, QuotesPage with view toggle, CentralPaymentsPage, StatementPage.

minor.issue: Quotes API returns data without authentication - may be intentional for public quote viewing, but consider if auth should be required

issues: Central Payments and Statements pages are not visible in the sidebar navigation - users need to navigate directly to /admin/central-payments and /admin/statements

TestHealthAndBasics.test_health_endpoint: PASS - Health endpoint returns healthy status

TestHeroBannersAPI.test_get_active_hero_banners: PASS - Returns 3 active banners for UnifiedHero component

TestCreativeServicesV2API.test_list_active_services: PASS - Returns list of creative services
TestCreativeServicesV2API.test_list_all_services_admin: PASS - Admin can list all services

TestQuotesAPI.test_list_quotes: PASS - Returns quotes with proper structure

landing_page_unified_hero.hero_section: PASS - UnifiedHero component present with data-testid
landing_page_unified_hero.hero_title: PASS - Dynamic title 'New Year Sale' from banner API
landing_page_unified_hero.quick_journey_card: PASS - 4-step journey card visible with 'B2B Optimized' badge
landing_page_unified_hero.cta_buttons: PASS - 'Shop Now' primary CTA and 'View Offers' secondary CTA
landing_page_unified_hero.rotation_dots: PASS - 3 navigation dots for banner rotation

quotes_page_view_toggle.kanban_columns: PASS - Shows Draft(9), Sent(0), Approved(1), Converted(9)

central_payments_page.record_payment_form: PASS - Manual payment form with Customer Email, Name, Company, Payment Method, Reference, Amount, Notes
central_payments_page.search_filter: PASS - Search and filter by payment method
central_payments_page.table_columns: PASS - Reference, Client, Method, Amount, Unallocated, Date

statement_page.customer_email_input: PASS - Email input for customer lookup
statement_page.description: PASS - Shows 'View invoice and payment history for a client account'

customer_dashboard_promo_strip.promo_message: PASS - 'Refer a friend and earn points on every order they make'
customer_dashboard_promo_strip.promo_cta: PASS - 'Share Now' CTA linking to referrals
customer_dashboard_promo_strip.rotation_dots: PASS - 3 progress dots for promo rotation
customer_dashboard_promo_strip.quick_cards: PASS - 6 cards: My Orders, Quotes, Designs, Invoices, Referrals, Points

action_items: Add Central Payments link to admin sidebar navigation
Add Statement of Account link to admin sidebar navigation
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: The Quotes API at /api/admin/quotes doesn't require authentication - verify if this is intentional
seed_data_creation: Test payment record created via POST /api/admin/central-payments during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A Platform Alignment fully tested. Key routes: 1) GET /api/creative-services-v2 - public creative services list, 2) GET /api/admin/crm-settings - industries and sources, 3) GET /api/admin/inventory-variants - product variants, 4) GET/POST /api/admin/central-payments - payment management, 5) GET /api/admin/statements/customer/{email} - customer statement. Frontend pages at /admin/quotes (with List/Cards/Kanban toggle), /admin/central-payments, /admin/statements, /dashboard (with ClientPromoStrip), Landing page (with UnifiedHero).
features_verified: GET /api/hero-banners/active - Returns banners for UnifiedHero - WORKING
GET /api/creative-services-v2 - Returns active creative services - WORKING
UnifiedHero on landing page with dynamic rotation - WORKING
ClientPromoStrip on customer dashboard with rotation - WORKING
CentralPaymentsPage with Record Payment form - WORKING
